name: pccheck
description: Ask Claude why your PC is slow and get a real answer: specs, live performance, temperatures, disk hogs, crashes, and wifi — 100% read-only.
long_description:
PCCheck gives Claude read-only eyes into your computer: hardware specs, live CPU/GPU/RAM load, temperatures, disk space and what's eating it, startup bloat, blue-screen history, antivirus status, and wifi quality. Windows-first; core checks also work on macOS and Linux.

Ask things like:
- "Run a full checkup on my PC"
- "Why is my computer slow right now?"
- "What's eating my disk space?"
- "Can my PC run Cyberpunk 2077?"
- "Why did my PC crash yesterday?"
- "Is my wifi the problem or my internet provider?"

Privacy: every tool is strictly read-only — nothing can be changed, deleted, or installed. PCCheck itself has no telemetry, accounts, or external APIs (its only network activity is the latency test: pings to your router, 1.1.1.1, and 8.8.8.8). Note that, like any MCP tool, results Claude requests become part of your Claude conversation.

tools.name: full_checkup
tools.description: Complete PC health checkup in one call

tools.name: system_overview
tools.description: Hardware specs: CPU, RAM, GPU, drives, displays

tools.name: performance_snapshot
tools.description: Live CPU/RAM/GPU load and top processes

tools.name: top_processes
tools.description: Processes by CPU or memory, filterable

tools.name: gpu_info
tools.description: GPU details, live NVIDIA stats, display refresh rates

tools.name: scan_folder_sizes
tools.description: Rank folders by size to find space hogs

tools.name: startup_programs
tools.description: Boot programs and their enabled/disabled state

tools.name: network_check
tools.description: Router-vs-internet ping diagnosis and wifi quality

tools.name: crash_report
tools.description: Blue screens, app crashes, freezes, antivirus, disk SMART

tools.name: installed_software
tools.description: Installed programs by size or install date

tools.name: battery_health
tools.description: Laptop battery wear and charge status
